items.title: America, U.S.A.
items.author: Eddie S. Glaude Jr
items.synopsis_full: The author of “Begin Again” delves into elements of America’s difficult and complicated past, and what they portend for our future.

items.title: Famesick
items.author: Lena Dunham
items.synopsis_full: The author of “Not That Kind of Girl” evaluates the effects that pursuing her creative endeavors had on her. Read by the author. 11 hours, 47 minutes unabridged.
